title: fix: preserve dashboard auth navigation
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Keeps the current dashboard hash when redirecting signed-out users to sign-in.
- Sends GitHub sign-in back to the same dashboard tab/hash instead of the default page.
- Sends logout to the signed-out News & FAQ tab.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/auth.ts enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/routes/index.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/routes/sign-in.tsx`
- `npm run typecheck` from `enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build:frontend` from `enter.pollinations.ai`

gist.headline: No more lost tabs
gist.blurb: Signing in won't lose your place anymore. We've fixed the dashboard navigation so you always return to the exact tab you were looking at.
gist.summary: Dashboard authentication flows now preserve the active URL hash, ensuring users return to their specific tab after signing in via GitHub or redirecting to the sign-in page.
gist.impact: Users will no longer lose their place in the dashboard when logging in, and logging out now cleanly routes to the News & FAQ tab.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot holding a tiny map or compass, navigating a path. Represents preserving the user's location/navigation state during auth flows.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny explorer's hat, holding a small map while standing next to a wooden signpost with glowing arrows. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
